name: Pennon and Battle
short_description: "Pennon and Battle" is a turn-based strategy war game. As a lord, you will play a crucial role in the revival of the kingdom! Lead heroes and armies to expand territory in Ruachland,  utilize tactics and magic to eliminate enemy forces, and create your own legend!
detailed_description:
Version Comparison

  • All players have the same maximum limit in the out-of-battle development section;

  • Regardless of whether players purchase Gems, they can reach this limit through daily gameplay;

  • Gems can substitute for Diamonds and are used to refresh certain random elements in the game.


About the Game

'Pennon and Battle' is a turn-based strategy game. As a lord, you will explore the edges of the map, develop town buildings, and lead your troop to grow amidst the intertwining of spell and smoke of war, ultimately letting your banner fly across all of Ruachland! 

Alignment Conflicts in Ruachland

  • 5 major Alignments: The Sacred Oath Alliance, masters of Mech technology; the nature-loving Elven Empire; the rapidly multiplying Ancient Swarm; the immortal Eternight Council; and the totem-revering Barbarian Tribe... Each Alignment features exclusive music。

Build Your Troop

  • 3 main hero classes: personally join battles, with ranged units able to switch to melee attack;

  • 55 heroes, each with unique talents, further customizable through a talent tree;

  • 17 hero skill categories: over 150 sub-skills, providing a different experience every moment;

  • 3 soldier advancement paths: directly recruit 140 soldiers, and control up to 168 soldiers through summoning, persuasion, and other means. Soldiers from different alignments can be flexibly combined. 

Strategize Your Tactics

  • Diverse skills: most Soldiers can use active skills and have unique passive effects;

  • Exclusive buildings: each alignment has 6 exclusive buildings, and you can use Brilliant Starstone to construct miracle buildings;

  • Rich spells: 6 spell schools + 1 special spell category, with over 130 spells available for both combat and exploration;

  • Event cards: 29 event cards, multiple can be carried into campaigns, each with specific blessing effects;

  • Treasure system: 8 types of treasures, including 7 legendary treasures and 10 alignment-exclusive treasures, over 200 items in total, with higher-level treasures easier to find using treasure maps and compasses. 

Choose Your Playstyle

  • Classic single-player campaign: 21 campaign maps with randomly generated elements, allowing players to configure alliances and various parameters;

  • Challenge campaign: 6 challenge maps, multiple difficulty levels and 17 treaties to test your limits; Story campaign: become the Elf Prince Serlin or an Eternight Council vanguard, leading your alignment to victory;

  • Multiple multiplayer modes: cooperate or compete online in the lobby, hotseat mode supports up to 8 players on the same device;

  • Epic Hero Battle: save your developed troop from campaigns to participate in tournament matches for rankings and rewards;

  • Map editor: built-in map editor and random map template editor, with sharing available via the creative workshop.
